MOTION TO STRIKE GENERAL DENIAL
Off Calendar Jan-08-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Edward Hung of Wong & Associates, 510-451-2124, appearing for plaintiff and moving party

No other appearances on this matter. The Court took PLAINTIFF CHARLES HUANG'S MOTION TO STRIKE GENERAL DENIAL off calendar as counsel submitted a stipulation and proposed order to the Court regarding filing a first amended complaint and answer. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
